mapper.select: select count(*) from app_member where member_status = 'ACTIVE'
select count(*) from hospital where status = #{status}
select count(*) from hospital_owner_request where status = 'pending'

where.if: AND ( UPPER(LOGIN_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NICKNAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(EMAIL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, NICKNAME AS nickname, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_STATUS AS memberStatus, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, DELETE_REQUESTED_AT AS deleteRequestedAt, HARD_DELETE_AT AS hardDeleteAt FROM APP_MEMBER
ORDER BY
LOGIN_ID
NICKNAME
ROLE
STATUS
MEMBER_STATUS
CREATED_AT
LAST_LOGIN_AT
MEMBER_ID
ASC
DESC
NULLS LAST
, MEMBER_ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

select member_id from app_member
order by member_id desc

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, NICKNAME AS nickname, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, MEMBER_STATUS AS memberStatus, TO_CHAR(EMAIL_VERIFIED) AS emailVerified, PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImage, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, DELETE_REQUESTED_AT AS deleteRequestedAt, DELETED_AT AS deletedAt, HARD_DELETE_AT AS hardDeleteAt FROM app_member where member_Id = #{memberId}
